enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder while high, recounting a frustrating multi-day ordeal with a malfunctioning computer requiring repeated store visits and a system reinstall. He also mentions working on his website, recording audiobooks via Kindle and QuickTime, and preparing bike race videos for an upcoming Race Across America event.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: appreciates that it saved his audiobook recordings even after losing the computer
enjoys recording and collecting them this way
